positive: A majestic golden retriever portrait silhouette surrounded by delicate watercolor floral garlands and wisps of stylized smoke. The dog is sitting confidently, facing slightly off-center, giving a regal and gentle appearance. The composition must be centrally balanced, with the dog and flowers occupying the main focus. Style should blend hyper-detailed botanical illustration with minimalist, crisp silhouette elements, using a limited color palette of deep sage green, earthy terracotta, and soft cream/ivory for the background fill. Strong contrast is essential for print quality. Perfect for clothing print, clean edges, scalable vector aesthetic.
